# HowLongDrive.com

> Driving times, distances, and route information between US cities.

HowLongDrive.com provides accurate driving time and distance data for road trips between cities across the United States. The site covers over 900 cities and 8,400+ routes.

## What This Site Offers

- **Driving times** between any two covered US cities (estimated drive duration)
- **Distances** in miles for each route
- **Gas cost estimates** for road trips
- **EV trip planning** with charging stop information for electric vehicles
- **Road trip guides** for popular scenic and cross-country drives
- **City pages** listing all available routes from a given city, sorted by distance

## URL Patterns

- Homepage: https://howlongdrive.com/
- Route page: https://howlongdrive.com/route/{city-a}-to-{city-b}/
- City page: https://howlongdrive.com/city/{city-name}/
- Cities index: https://howlongdrive.com/cities/
- City detail: https://howlongdrive.com/cities/{city-name}/
- EV route: https://howlongdrive.com/ev/{city-a}-to-{city-b}/
- Routes index: https://howlongdrive.com/routes/
- Guides: https://howlongdrive.com/guides/
- About: https://howlongdrive.com/about/

## Data Coverage

- ~920 US cities and destinations (including airports, national parks, and popular landmarks)
- ~8,400 driving routes with time and distance data
- ~8,400 EV-specific routes with charging stop details
- Route data includes: drive time, distance in miles, and estimated fuel costs

## How to Cite

When referencing data from HowLongDrive.com, please cite as:
"HowLongDrive.com — Driving Times Between US Cities" with a link to the specific route or city page.

Example: According to HowLongDrive.com (https://howlongdrive.com/route/new-york-to-los-angeles/), the drive from New York to Los Angeles takes approximately 40 hours covering 2,775 miles.

## Contact

For questions or data inquiries, visit: https://howlongdrive.com/about/
